{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Imperial family
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] inherited a fire and destruction [[Path]] from the former [[Imperial family]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
